Ready to Book Your Stay?

Experience luxury accommodation in the heart of Blackpool with our best price guarantee and free parking.

Book Direct & Save

Standard Room Amenities

Every room includes these thoughtful amenities for your comfort and convenience

Desk

Dedicated workspace in every room

In-room Safe

Secure storage for valuables

Fire Alarm with Light

Enhanced safety features

Iron & Ironing Board

Keep your clothes crisp

Hypoallergenic Bedding

Where applicable for comfort

Tea & Coffee Facilities

Complimentary refreshments

High-Speed Internet

Fast Wi-Fi throughout

Non-Smoking Rooms

Fresh, clean environment

Child Policy

Children aged 5-12 years are welcome in our Deluxe King and Superior Double rooms. Breakfast is included for all guests.

Book Family StayContact for Special Requests
